name: Beaverbrook Art Gallery
description: Host your event in one of our fully equipped gallery spaces or pavilions. The Beaverbrook is a unique site for weddings, conferences, meetings, celebrations of life, birthday parties, and more.

name: New Brunswick Museum
description: The New Brunswick Museum is building a bold new space to showcase our history. We look forward to reopening in 2028 – stay connected asthe vision takes shape!
